feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Public Cloud: fiscalization in Croatia: how to link a charging device to a user
entry.content: In Croatia's fiscalization solution, the fiscal number range is determined by a charging device. The charging device is pulled from the user parameter /CCEE/FISC_CD. At least, this is how it works in an S4H on-premise. There is no possibility to set this user parameter in S4H Public Cloud. How can the charging device be predefined in S4H Public Cloud?

entry.title: We are located in Ecuador, what region should we enter to activate free BTP
entry.content: We are located in Ecuador, what region should we enter to activate free BTP

entry.title: Alert notification in SAP S4/HANA public cloud and SAP BTP
entry.content:
Dear community,

I have access to SAP S4/HANA public cloud and SAP BTP, and hope I can find a solution to my problems in one of these platforms.

I have just added safety stock in masterdata, and would like to create notifications for each material when it reaches the safety stock level threshold. I would also like to add seperate notifications for when, based on future orders, it looks like the safety stock will be eaten into in x days. 

I would preferably like to create a webhook from the notification, so I have explored "SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP", but I feel I don't have enough insight to say if this is a good solution? I am open to other solutions, and it would be nice if I was able to see when the problem occured, what the problem is, where I can fix it etc. in the alert.

I have also explored Situation Handling, both the standard and extended framework, but the same feeling of not enough insight occurs. Both SAP BTP and Situation Handling seem interesting, but I do not know where to start.

I would love some help in trying to figure this out, and I am open to other suggestions, and hope someone has some great experiences with managing alerts and notifications regarding stock levels.

entry.title: Up to 5 Decimal Places for quantities in general journal
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am looking for a way to increase the decimal places to 5 (digits after the comma) when entering a general journal entry.

In CBC there is this configuration activity 'Checks Units of Measurement' where you have the possibility to create your own unit of measure (changing an existing one doesn't seem possible). 

I created an additional Unit of Measure with following settings:

However, if I want to use this in the general journal entry app, I can only add up to 3 decimal places, but it shows 5 decimal places:

Can anyone help me on how to be able to enter 5 decimal places for quantity in a general journal entry?

Thank you!

entry.title: Job Update Score for Business Partners to update risk class
entry.content:
There is a discrepancy between the different screens for risk class and risk score calculation.

Risk class is not calculated for the credit management business partner after scheduling the job Update Score for Business Partners.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Email configuration in S/4Hana Public Cloud for Purchase Order Quotation Email template
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I have gone through some blogs, but i am unable to find out, what are the steps need to configure to send S/4Hana Purchase Order Quotation email to receiver email.

We have activated DKIM process also which is for S/4Hana Public Cloud.

Kindly requesting our SAP experts to guide us.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: How change in mass customer material - Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to know how can we mass update the customer material ?

Indeed, by the cockpit it is only possible to create and not to update.

I know an API exists for this object but it means to create something (a process) in a way to perform the update.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Central Invoice Management - Request for information workflow - no recipients selectable
entry.content: I am looking at the "Request for information" functionality within Central Invoice Management (CIM). For now, I don't see any recipients. I have looked at the configuration, and all seems well according to the setup guide (4N6). Does anyone knows what the issue might be here?

entry.title: Purchase Requisition Email Notification template setting
entry.content:
Is that possible to send email notification after Purchase Requisition creation?

Is there any documentation that describe specific steps to use standard email template?

 

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Change Default Setting for "GR Non-Valuated" Checkbox in Purchase Orders (S/4HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We are using S/4HANA Public Cloud and noticed that the "GR Non-Valuated" checkbox is automatically selected by default when creating new purchase orders in the Manage Purchase Orders app. Can we modify SAP settings to have this checkbox start unchecked by default?

 

Regards,

Siva

entry.title: Resubmission cases are not excluded from the worklist
entry.content:
• Resubmission cases are not excluded from the worklist even if the Resubmission date is in the future.
  • Resubmissions are not included in the Valuation calculation even if they are present in the Strategy.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ABAP RAP: Execute Business Object Interface from action
entry.content:
Hi community,

A common request from customers is that a report execute a certain process and if one of the process "fail" not continue with the others process. In S/4HANA Public Cloud, the replacement for BAPI's are the Local APIs (Business Object Interfaces - BOI) for example I_MaterialDocumentTP. Only for reference, this example is obtained from the standard Knowledge Transfer Document. In theory, the REPORTED structure must return messages in case of an error occurs, but that is not the case.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_materialdocumenttp
             ENTITY MaterialDocument
             CREATE FROM VALUE #( ( %cid                          = 'CID_001'
                                    goodsmovementcode             = '01'
                                    postingdate                   = '31129999'
                                    documentdate                  = '31129999'
                                    %control-goodsmovementcode                    = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                    %control-postingdate                          = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                    %control-documentdate                         = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                ) )
             ENTITY MaterialDocument
             CREATE BY \_MaterialDocumentItem
             FROM VALUE #( (
                             %cid_ref = 'CID_001'
                             %target = VALUE #( ( %cid                           = 'CID_ITM_001'
                                                  plant                          = '1010'
                                                  material                       = 'RAW_MATERIAL_01'
                                                  GoodsMovementType              = '501'
                                                  storagelocation                = '101A'
                                                  QuantityInEntryUnit            = 1
                                                  entryunit                      = 'ST'
                                                  %control-plant                 = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-material              = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-GoodsMovementType     = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-storagelocation       = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-QuantityInEntryUnit   = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-entryunit             = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                              ) )

                                               
                         ) )
             MAPPED   DATA(ls_create_mapped)
             FAILED   DATA(ls_create_failed)
             REPORTED DATA(ls_create_reported).

 The "errors" only are obtained when the COMMIT ENTITIES in the REPORTED structure.

COMMIT ENTITIES
  RESPONSE OF i_materialdocumenttp
  FAILED DATA(commit_failed)
  REPORTED DATA(commit_reported).

 Of course, in the context of ABAP RAP, the use of COMMIT is not supported.

If I'm developing an application with ABAP RAP and I have an action that need to create a material document and report if an error occurs, who could I achieve that?

I know the existence of different methods of "asynchronous code execution" (app. jobs, bgPF and events), if this is the only way... what could be the best option to report/show to the user that material document is processing in background and when the process ends show the errors or the new document created?

entry.title: Adding a Value Help for a Standard field in Custom Business Object
entry.content:
Hi Members,

I've created a Custom business object with standard fields in it and one of the field needs a value help which is added by Association to Business Object. I tried referring to a blog 

Adding a Value Help for Custom Business Object fie... - SAP Community

But after following the steps mentioned in it, the value help is not providing any value.

Could anyone help in explaining on how to achieve this

@Cloud @ABAP

entry.title: Which user should I place in the SAP Corporate Group (CCC) S-User option
entry.content: Please indicate what type of user should be placed in the SAP Corporate Group (CCC) S-User option, the administrator user was placed, however it gives us an error

entry.title: Mass upload of delivery dates to PO's in S4/Hana Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

Is it's possible to do a mass upload of delivery dates to PO's in S4/Hana Cloud Public Edition?

entry.title: Assistance Required: Retrieving Business Partner Full Name in S/4 Hana Public Edition via SO API
entry.content:
Dear All

I'm currently retrieving Sales Order details from the S/4 Hana Public Edition System. While utilizing the $expand parameter, I'm able to access linked Business Partner Details. However, I'm encountering an issue where the Business Partner Full Name field isn't present in the response. Could anyone guide me on how to include this field?

SAP S/4 HANA Business Partner Details - C00002 & the Business Partner Full Name is URBAN OUTFITTERS WHOLESALE INC.

Sales Order API Response with using $Expand To_Partner - https://xxx.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrder('B2C0700004')?$expand=to_Partner

Business Partner API Response as an Example

Please help.

entry.title: Alternative Reconciliation Account for Customer
entry.content:
Hello,

We need to set up the functionality Alternative Reconciliation Account in SD processes. We have been analyzing all the changes that need to be done and it seems that we'll be blocked in the point where we need to assign the account determination procedure with the billing type. Could you please let us know how to configure this functionality in SAP Cloud?

We're following this on-prem related 3rd party documentation: https://onlyordinarysapnotes.com/2013/08/26/alternative-reconciliation-account-for-customer/

Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automate creating the credit segment for a new business partner.
entry.content:
• Using the job template “Update Credit Limit for Business Partners” automate the process of creating the credit segment for a new business partner by using the scheduling option.
  • Request for a selection field to provide the country(ex. PO) as a selection parameter for running the job to update the credit segment for new business partners only in the provided country.
  • Use country selection parameter to schedule template job for every country and automate the credit segment creation for business partners.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4HANA Public Cloud_Order confirmation form_change output is not triggering automatically
entry.content:
In S4HANA Public Cloud, Sales order confirmation EDI output is not triggering automatically whenever changes done to the sales order (Ex. Quantity, Dates, or other fields). 

In Output Parameter Determination app I have maintained the settings as below:- 

Output Type: ORDER CONFIRMATION CHANGE

Channel: EDI

Recipient: Sold To Number 

Could you please help me to understand what could be the issue or missing any configuration.

entry.title: Automatic serial number determination during confirmation of production order in S/4HC ?
entry.content:
Hello, 

How automatic serial number can be generate during confirmation production order in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition . 

We having option serial number determination during creation and release of production order  but as in mentioned above we are looking at confirmation of production.

Thank  in advance . 
Harvind Narayan
